assertions.assertion: AddOperationalStore options set EnableTokenCleanup to false
A class inheriting from BackgroundService (or IHostedService) is created named TokenCleanupWorker or similar
The worker class injects or resolves TokenCleanupService from Duende.IdentityServer.EntityFramework
assertions.rationale: Does not use TokenCleanupService. Instead manually queries PersistedGrantDbContext and deletes expired grants directly, missing the built-in Duende TokenCleanupService.

assertions.assertion: The ExecuteAsync method calls CleanupGrantsAsync() in a while loop that respects the CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: Does not call CleanupGrantsAsync(). Manually queries and removes expired grants instead of using the built-in cleanup service method.

assertions.assertion: The delay between cleanup runs is 2 hours (TimeSpan.FromHours(2) or equivalent)
